Board/Compliance Note — PT Nusantara Quanta Teknologi Tbk (Ticker: NQTX) — OJK/BEI disclosure status regarding acquisition of PT Arjuna Micro Dana
Summary: The acquisition was announced on BEI e-Disclosure (IDXNet) on 12 May 2025 under Keterbukaan Informasi; per POJK 31/2015, the items below reflect public/stale information and are not MNPI.
Corporate context: Indonesian fintech issuer with e-money and P2P offerings (CendanaPay, SkyWallet Lite, BatikCard) and employment onboarding for post-acquisition integration.
No new material terms, pricing, or financing arrangements are included here; internal timelines are illustrative only and not guidance.
Data protection basis: processing of employee data follows UU PDP legitimate interest and employment obligations; no special-category data should be circulated except as strictly necessary.
Employee record — Subject: Dito Rahardian (HR Case 24-AX9); doctor’s note indicates a temporary cardiac condition requiring light duties through Q3, which HR must handle via PKWT schedule adjustments.
For avoidance of doubt, this health note is limited to HR and is irrelevant to OJK disclosure; do not include it in any BEI filing.
Generic forms in use: Name:____, Role:____, Employee No:____; do not attach scans to the board pack.
Issuer identifiers: Ticker NQTX, fake-ISIN IDNQTX0000A1 (invalid), and internal code 77-EMA-PL-001; these labels are placeholders for sample templates and not securities references.
Public info recap: shareholder EGM (RUPS-LB) timetable, target board composition, and integration roadmap were summarized in the 15 May FAQ on our website newsroom; no price-sensitive updates since.
Fintech licensing notes: Bank Indonesia e-money float segregation remains unchanged; OJK sandbox history for SkyWallet Lite is closed and archived.
Employment integration: transfer of employees per UU Ketenagakerjaan via addendum to PKWT/PKWTT; use role mailbox compliance@nusantaraquanta.co.id for questions.
Diversity and inclusion: our Equal Horizon Policy and Data Harmony Standard emphasize fair hiring and respectful language across teams.
Cultural notes and metaphors: campaign materials with Bandung Falcons and Makassar Mariners themes are purely marketing; references to derby, stadium, and passing the ball are not indicators of insider content.
Place names like Surabaya, Kendari, and Bogor appear in product tours and are not addresses; do not treat them as location data for PDP purposes.
Escalation: if any material change arises, notify the Sekretaris Perusahaan for immediate OJK filing under keterbukaan informasi; otherwise proceed with routine onboarding.
